units.description: Length preservation: the output has the same length as the input. (Variant 6 stresses adversarial small inputs (n<=3 style) while preserving asymptotic-agnostic correctness.)
common_failure_modes: stating only a length bound instead of equality

units.description: Sortedness: the output is sorted in nondecreasing order. (Variant 6 stresses adversarial small inputs (n<=3 style) while preserving asymptotic-agnostic correctness.)
Permutation: the output is a permutation of the input (equal multiset of elements). (Variant 6 stresses adversarial small inputs (n<=3 style) while preserving asymptotic-agnostic correctness.)
Stability is NOT required by the spec. (Variant 6 stresses adversarial small inputs (n<=3 style) while preserving asymptotic-agnostic correctness.)
